title: Senior Software Engineer - IBM India International Enterprises - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - IBM India International Enterprises - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
IBM India International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Ghaziabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About IBM India International Enterprises:
IBM India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IBM India International Enterprises!
